# Principia -> Lean program queue

*Generated by verification/tools/ps_queue.py (ledger LPS-O5).*

Claim-bearing atlas nodes (theorem/proposition/lemma/corollary/axiom) per book, against the Lean coverage maps. "Mapped" counts anchors a coverage map has reached at any class (proved-kernel, conditional, partial, definition); the coverage docs carry the per-anchor honesty. "Bound" counts anchors reached only by sha-pinned dual-source bindings (staleness-protected transcriptions awaiting a coverage map).

- Claim-bearing nodes: **476**
